title: Shell-safe find grap outputs
desc: The find command must emit minimal but high-signal grap strings that are safe to paste into a shell and re-run verbatim. Keep # FOCUS for the current focused leaf path because unrelated popups can still affect interaction, and keep # TARGET hwnd-first with only the essential discriminators needed to resolve ambiguity.
steps: Emit # FOCUS with the full focused leaf path.
Emit # TARGET as a shell-friendly, paste-ready grap string with hwnd as the primary token.
Verify copy-pasted grap strings by rerunning find and checking that they resolve back to the same target.
author: claude
